home.title: Welcome
home.bio:
We build software that moves people. If you've ever booked an airport transfer, there's a chance our team helped get you from A to B after your flight landed.

I'm the co-founder of GoodJourney.io — a ground transportation operating system. We handle bookings, drivers, vehicles, and a dispatch engine that matches the right ride to the right driver. Our focus is airport transfers: wherever you land, GoodJourney OS should get you where you need to go. We're working to unify ground transportation companies and online booking agents under one system.

We're a small team. We call ourselves team-silent — we keep our heads down, stay quiet, and get things done.

Right now I'm deep into learning how AI can automate my life, help me level up as a founder, coder, designer, and product manager, and how we can build the future of AI-powered applications.

When I'm not doing that, I practice my golf swing. I also eat too many [Undercover Snacks dark chocolate quinoa sea salt mini crisps](https://www.undercoversnacks.com/product/dark-chocolate-sea-salt-mini-crisps/). They sound healthy. They are not.

This is my journal.
